description_long: This object consists of four decorative pillows arranged in a neat, slightly overlapping row. Each pillow features a distinct design: the frontmost has a tan background with dark brown science-themed line art, the second is a solid dark brown, the third displays a geometric pattern in muted orange and gray, and the last is a solid gray with subtle shading. The pillows are plump and appear to be made of soft fabric, likely filled with a lightweight material such as polyester fiber or down. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with the printed designs adding visual interest. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for use in urban living spaces or outdoor seating areas.
description: A set of four decorative pillows, each with unique patterns and colors, arranged in a row. The designs include science-themed line art, geometric shapes, and solid colors in brown, gray, and orange tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four pillows stacked, with the science-themed pillow most prominent.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the thickness and plumpness of each pillow, as well as their distinct patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view with the solid gray pillow in front, showing a small printed label and the backs of the other pillows.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back, emphasizing the geometric and solid color pillows' side profiles.
attribute_pattern: science-themed line art, geometric, and solid color
attribute_brand_logo: small printed logo on the back of the gray pillow
attribute_tag_or_label: printed label on the back of the gray pillow
attribute_placement: stacked with other pillows, isolated with no context
